---
title: "Lucas Johnson"
image: "yosemite.jpeg"
links:
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/lucas-johnson"
  - label: ResearchGate
    url: "https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Lucas-Johnson-8"
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/lucaskjohnson"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:lucas.k.johnson03+site@gmail.com"
  - label: CV
    url: "cv.pdf"
output:
  postcards::solana
site: distill::distill_website
---
 
## Bio
In broad academic terms, my education and experience make me a geographer, but practically speaking I do geospatial data science. I'm currently a Data Scientist with the [Arête Glacier Initiative](https://www.areteglaciers.org/) where I'm working to build better forecasts of sea-level rise. 

Previously, I spent 6+ years researching applications of remote sensing in forest ecology and management. I carried out this research as a Postdoctoral Scholar with Oregon State University and the [USFS RMRS](https://research.fs.usda.gov/rmrs) Forest Inventory and Analysis unit in Riverdale, Utah, and as Research Assistant with the [Climate and Applied Forest Research Institute](http://cafri-ny.org/) while I earned my Ph.D. at SUNY ESF. The bulk of that work is reflected in the [papers](papers.html) and [presentations](presentations.html) tabs on this site.

## Education

**SUNY College of Environmental Science & Forestry** | Syracuse, NY

Ph.D. in Environmental Science | August 2019 - May 2024

**Tufts University** | Medford, MA 

B.S. in Computer Science | August 2013 - May 2017

## Experience

**Data Scientist** | Arête Glacier Initiative | April 2026 - Present

**Postdoctoral Scholar** | Oregon State University | August 2024 - April 2026

**Research Assistant** | SUNY ESF, [CAFRI](http://cafri-ny.org/) | August 2019 - August 2024

**Data Engineer** | Lightkeeper, LLC | August 2017 - July 2019
